docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $645.00 FILED BY 708-710-712 BAY STREET  HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT RAISIN, PRESTON W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAISIN, PRESTON W.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 708-710-712 BAY STREET  HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAISIN, PRESTON W. $645.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $684.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RAISIN, PRESTON W.
